positive: A minimalist, highly stylized illustration of a celestial forest at twilight. The main subject is a group of delicate, bioluminescent flora and fauna nestled among the roots of massive, glowing trees. Focus on intricate leaf patterns, stylized whimsical woodland creatures (like gentle fox silhouettes and hummingbirds), and a deep color palette of indigo, teal, sapphire, and electric lime. Composition must be centered, featuring clean, strong silhouettes against a gradient sky. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with clean vector illustration, high contrast, designed for apparel printing, isolated subject area, volumetric lighting.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, watermarks, text, signature, logos, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, gradient sky, photorealistic, noisy, out of focus
